prompt: Please generate a set of 6 individual trendy studio pet portraits based on the clear pet photo I uploaded. Requirements: - Each image should be in a 3:4 vertical composition. - Output each image independently; no collages, no grids, no poster layouts. - All 6 images must clearly feature the same pet. - Strictly preserve the pet's real features: breed, body type, face shape, eyes, nose, mouth, ears, fur color, patterns, fur texture, and demeanor. - No face-swapping, no color changes, do not turn it into a stranger's pet, no excessive anthropomorphism, and no anatomical errors. Theme: Trendy studio pet portrait series. Overall Style: High-end pet photography studio, dark blue or blue-gray vintage textured background, fashion magazine aesthetic, trendy, cute, with a bit of an attitude, like a celebrity pet photoshoot. Key Requirements: Do not generate 6 similar standard studio shots. The most important aspect of this set is that the expressions, movements, and angles must be distinctly different, more vivid, and resemble interesting candid moments. The 6 images must differentiate across these areas: - Different expressions: poker face, sticking out tongue, slightly open mouth, head tilt, chin up, side-glancing at the camera, curious, funny, looking back, etc. - Different movements: sitting, standing, side view, half-turn, one paw raised, leaning forward, looking up, poking head out, looking like a captured moment of motion. - Different shots: front view, close-up, side profile, 3/4 view, low angle, high angle, half body, full body. - At least 3 images must have a clear 'candid' feel, rather than being perfectly posed. Clothing and Accessories: Natural, realistic, and size-appropriate trendy outfits and lightweight accessories: - Black and white color-blocked fleece jacket - White high-collar zip-up jacket - Small black sunglasses - Vintage sports headphones - Small hats, scarves, bow ties. Note: Clothing and accessories are secondary; the focus remains on the pet's expression, movement, and sense of fashion. Outfits must be natural and follow realistic pet wearing logic; the positions of limbs, neck, ears, and tail must be natural. The 6 specific frames: 1. Front half-body shot, wearing small black sunglasses, cool expression, like a streetwear brand cover. 2. Close-up headshot, sunglasses pushed up to the top of the head, sticking out tongue or slightly open mouth, funny and cute expression. 3. Side or 3/4 side shot, wearing a black and white fleece jacket, one paw naturally raised as if posing. 4. Front sitting shot, wearing a white high-collar zip-up jacket, small sunglasses, look with attitude. 5. Slightly low-angle shot, looking at the camera with chin up, wearing headphones or lightweight accessories, like a pet DJ. 6. Close-up portrait, slight head tilt or looking back at the camera, simple clothing, highlighting facial features and fur details. Quality Requirements: Realistic pet photography, high-definition details, studio quality, real fur, real fabric textures, natural and vivid, cute yet high-end, with a 'Xiaohongshu' viral pet portrait aesthetic. Avoid: No multiple pets, no watermarks/text, no cartoonization, no doll-like appearance, no plastic-looking fur, no stiff posing, no extra paws, no deformed ears, no cluttered background, no low resolution, no excessive skin smoothing.
